2346150.name: EOL: End Of Line
2346150.description:
EOL:End of Line is a 4x turn-based strategy game where you fight for control of the System from AI control programs.  Expand your control by sizing System nodes, then exploit those nodes using buildings to extract resources to fuel your expansion and ultimately the extermination of the AI programs.

 

How will you claim the System?

Build a number of different structures and units to help grow your control while balancing resource extraction vs consumption.

 

How will you grow your control?

Distribute your structures across the system to capture unique resource nodes to give your buildings an output boost?

Utilize the games Synergy system by placing the same extraction building next to each other to boost output and create specialized extraction zones?

 

How will you keep your control?

Will you utilize the system topography to create barriers and choke points allowing for your slow heavily armored Tanks to maintain supremacy?

Maybe a system of Portals and Electrical Metallic Tubing to create a network that allows you to quickly deploy units around your territory?

Take the fight to the AI with fast lightly armored Scouts to disrupt the AI’s supply chain starving it of vital resource?

 

On to the next System!

Victory or Defeat it is never the same game twice as each System is generated to be a new and distinct experience.
